## Checklist

- [ ] I have read the [contributing guidelines](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] My code follows the existing code style of the project.
- [ ] I have tested my changes — the app builds and the affected feature works.
- [ ] I have added no new dependencies unless absolutely necessary.
- [ ] My changes do not introduce telemetry, analytics, or external network calls without user consent.
